ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot carefully holding a test tube.  The robot will hold the test tube with both arms, using a gentle, precise movement.  Frame 1 starts with arms slightly raised and angled, ready to receive the test tube. Frame 2 shows the arms gently curving inward to cradle the test tube. Frame 3 shows the test tube held securely, with the arms slightly adjusted for better support. Frame 4 shows the robot holding the test tube steadily, ready for observation or experimentation. Frame 5 shows the robot slowly lowering the test tube to a safe location. The sequence emphasizes careful handling and scientific precision.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, ready to receive
arms curve inward, gently taking the tube
holding the tube steady, supporting with care
test tube held securely, ready for science
